message:
perf(lipgloss): Optimize layout and style rendering to reduce allocations

lib.rs optimizations:
- join_vertical: Count newlines directly instead of calling lines().count()
- place(): Pre-compute alignment factor once instead of per-line
- place(): Create blank line once and reuse for top/bottom padding
- place(): Build result directly into String instead of Vec<String> + join()

style.rs optimizations:
- render(): Only strip carriage returns if present (avoids allocation)
- render(): Only process newlines for inline mode if string contains them
- render(): Apply ANSI styling in single pass without intermediate Vec
- render(): Pre-calculate capacity to minimize reallocations

These changes reduce allocations in hot paths for terminal UI rendering,
particularly beneficial when rendering many styled lines or large layouts.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
